title: Supply Chain Manager - Kuehne+Nagel India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Kuehne+Nagel India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Kuehne+Nagel India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kuehne+Nagel India:
Kuehne+Nagel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kuehne+Nagel India!
